category_sources: source_facts.description describes ProgressLine as tracking command progress in a compact one-line format.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage uses the official repository name kattouf/ProgressLine.
source_facts.name provides the package name progressline.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo points to the official repository; README is the best available official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/kattouf/ProgressLine, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies compact one-line command progress tracking.
source_facts.executables lists the progressline CLI executable.
